description: One surfaced evidence item inside the launcher packet.

id.description: Stable evidence identifier or runtime-derived synthetic key.

family.description: Canonical evidence families used by the launcher routing surface.

title.description: Human-readable evidence title suitable for launcher surfacing.

summary.description: Short evidence summary for routing and operator review.

source_type.description: Origin type such as graphrag, regulation, governance_read_model, or runtime_readback.

evidence_ref.description: Reference path, query id, or runtime correlation id for read-back.
